step_by_step_thinking: The Universal system from Mani Inc. utilizes specific designations for each instrument, where "D" denotes files that have been modified with an additional cutting tip (called a Pro-Taper). The "Pro-Taper" feature aims to enhance procedural efficiency by allowing simultaneous preparation and irrigation access through one tool. Given this context, option A (D-1), which likely refers to the first file designed within their modified series, would logically be equipped with such features as it precedes others in sequence.
